commands.review_summary:
The branch hardens plugin, provider, schema, Codex app-server, gateway, and effective tool inventory projections against unreadable or malformed plugin-owned metadata with broad synthetic fuzz coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main directly reads active registry toolMetadata and tool names, while the PR adds throwing-getter fixtures that exercise the failure mode. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is the right lane because this protected maintainer draft needs compatibility, auth-provider, availability, and proof-scope judgment rather than a narrow automated repair.
